question: Authoring surface residence: a new bench author verb with its own harness/author subsystem and server, or mutating routes added to the operator bench serve?
author: claude/design

question: Spec byte fidelity model: the wizard emits YAML into an editable text pane whose exact bytes are previewed and locked, or a structured form model that serializes at lock time?
author: claude/design

question: Stage execution from the authoring surface: excluded in v1 (run/grade/judge stay CLI; the observer watches), or include a run trigger with process management?
author: claude/design

question: Draft residence: plain directories under the workspace root (no ledger yet, so invisible to the operator home until locked), or an explicit drafts registry?
author: claude/design
